name: Birch-Steamed Pork Ribs
description: A dish made with branches and ribs. The ribs are marinated, air-dried, then placed on birch branches and steamed. When served, the meat is fall-apart tender, with a distinctive woody aroma. It is one of Nod-Krai's traditional festive dishes.

suspicious.name: Suspicious Birch-Steamed Pork Ribs
suspicious.description: A dish made with branches and ribs. You casually take a piece, only to find it deep reddish-brown from drying, with lines across its surface like the rings of an old tree. Add in that coarse texture, and... Hold on. Surely this is not a branch mistaken for a rib?
suspicious.effect: Decreases all party members' gliding and sprinting Stamina consumption by 15% for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).

normal.name: Birch-Steamed Pork Ribs
normal.description: A dish made with branches and ribs. The ribs are marinated, air-dried, then placed on birch branches and steamed. When served, the meat is fall-apart tender, with a distinctive woody aroma. It is one of Nod-Krai's traditional festive dishes.
normal.effect: Decreases all party members' gliding and sprinting Stamina consumption by 20% for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).

delicious.name: Delicious Birch-Steamed Pork Ribs
delicious.description: A dish made with branches and ribs. With the lightest nudge of a fork, the meat falls from the bone like snow sliding from a branch. As it touches your tongue, its deep, savory richness mingles with the faint woodland aroma of steamed birch, finally melting into a warmth that leaves you wholly content.
delicious.effect: Decreases all party members' gliding and sprinting Stamina consumption by 25% for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).
